prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-6FUNC-POCKETKNIFE Product Type: MULTITOOL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 6 Function Classic Pocket Knife Essential Multi Tool Description: You can't expect the unexpected but you can definitely be prepared for the unexpected.

6 Function ASR Outdoor Multi-Tool Pocket Knife is a must have accessory on any camping trip or outdoor adventure. The compact and portable design of this multi-tool allows for extra tools to be concealed in the body while keeping its' slender shape. The functions include scissors, knife, file, tweezers, tooth pick, and flathead.

You won't want to be on any camping or hiking trips without the 6 Function ASR Outdoor Multi-Tool Pocket Knife. Search Terms: survival tool camping knife pocket outdoor mult-tool classic old timer Features: - EDC ESSENTIAL: This Every Day Carry folding knife multi tool sports a classic style that looks great and keeps you prepared for anything - HIGHLY USABLE FUNCTIONS: The 6 essential functions include: Scissors, Knife, File, Tweezers, Tooth Pick, and Flathead, covering all the basics of your multi tool pocket knife needs - COMPACT DESIGN: At 2.5 Inches long this pocket knife fits anywhere and comes with a useful key ring for multiple storage and carry capabilities === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6 Function Classic Pocket Knife Multi-Tool
